purpose: Make the next free MI350 window test whether the missed B=1 S=2048 development target is improved by a retained MoE bridge variant rather than repeating the canonical compact-reduce timing.

actions.probe-ops-sweep-2048: Runs isolated dense, no-mask, compact-reduce, and compact-scatter dynamic MoE bridge probes at S=2048.
actions.probe-ops-sweep-4096: Runs the same isolated MoE bridge probe sweep at S=4096.
actions.bench-moe-sweep-2048: Runs selected full-layer S=2048 MoE implementation variants with the canonical attention path.
actions.bench-moe-sweep-4096: Runs selected full-layer S=4096 MoE implementation variants with the canonical attention path.
actions.sweep-2048: Runs both the S=2048 isolated MoE bridge probe sweep and the S=2048 full-layer MoE implementation sweep.

full_layer_moe_variants.label: no_mask_bmm_out
full_layer_moe_variants.role: Tests whether compact valid-row reduction overhead is worth it at S=2048.

full_layer_moe_variants.label: compact_scatter
full_layer_moe_variants.role: Tests compact grad_y construction versus compact-reduce.

full_layer_moe_variants.label: dynamic_bmm_out
full_layer_moe_variants.role: Older dense masked dynamic path with bmm-out dgrad.

full_layer_moe_variants.label: no_mask_dense
full_layer_moe_variants.role: No-mask path without the bmm-out dgrad specialization.

blocking_kfd_process.command: python3 /exp/tools/dsv4_coda_attention_layer_gate.py --m-values 64 --cache-seqlen 512 --groups 1 --dtype bf16 --device cuda --q-absorb-backend gemm-qpe-on-read --q-absorb-direct-backend sumsq-gemm --q-partials-handoff partials --post-tail-mode next-gemm-coda --post-tail-backend tilelang --post-next-backend deepgemm-next-row-scale --num-split 1 --mla-kv-format fp8-block --mla-value-group-tiles 2 --block-n 64 --bench-timing event --warmup 1 --rep 2 --rounds 1 --aiter-root /exp/sources/wip/aiter --aiter-aot-import --json-output /exp/artifacts/dsv4_coda_fp8_blockkv_mla_20260531_dev/direct_fp8block_group2_smoke_m64_retry3.json

last_attempted_node_status.decision: Skipped perf sweep to avoid contaminating measurements or interrupting an external GPU workload.
